title: Revamp visual aesthetic to a refined, stylish look

requirements.text: Revamp the entire frontend visual aesthetic to feel refined, stylish, and aesthetic while retaining the energetic deal-hunting vibe. Replace the current bold/loud color palette with a more curated, premium look — consider deep jewel tones, soft gradients, elegant typography, refined card layouts with subtle shadows and borders, and polished micro-interactions. Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js accordingly. Apply changes consistently across all pages and components: HomePage, ListingDetailPage, ProductCard, CategoryFilter, Layout, OrderForm, AdminLoginPage, AdminDashboardPage, ListingsManagementPage, OrdersDashboardPage, AddListingForm, EditListingForm, and CountdownTimer.
acceptanceCriteria: The site uses a cohesive, aesthetic color palette (e.g., deep jewel tones or muted luxe colors) replacing the previous loud neon/orange scheme.
Typography feels refined — clean font choices, well-spaced headings and body text, elegant price callouts.
Product cards have polished styling: subtle gradients or borders, smooth hover animations, and refined badge design.
The category filter bar, header, footer, and hero section all reflect the updated aesthetic consistently.
Admin panel pages (login, dashboard, listings, orders) share the same refined visual language.
Countdown timers and discount badges remain highly visible but are styled to match the new aesthetic.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns) have consistent, polished styling with smooth transitions.
Dark background is retained but feels premium rather than harsh.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change any backend logic or data models.
Do not alter routing structure or page-level component hierarchy.
nonGoals: Changing the backend schema or API.
